title: cercestis taiensis
intro: Cercestis taiensis, also known as the Taiwanese Cestrum or Taisi, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, known for its unique and fragrant flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine in Taiwan and has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Cercestis taiensis include infusions and decoctions, often used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
